base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should reduce charm_pin_pullback_long tail heat and possibly remove the -527 high-extension/rejection entry while preserving most fast charm-pin winners. The tradeoff is lower charm-pin throughput and possible loss of some profitable high-extension recoveries; reject if total PnL falls below 98% of run_001, charm-pin PnL retention falls below 90%, or completed trades drop more than 5-10%.
label: charm-pin-dynamic-vwap-tail-trim
rationale: Use one underexplored, profile-specific upstream-entry family rather than repeating the duplicate charm-pin tail-risk veto box or saturated take-profit work. The latest run has strong realized PnL but hidden heat: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1474.1 over 38 trades with median hold 5.3 minutes, yet owns the global -527 MAE. The worst row is a narrow high-extension charm-pin rejection pattern with ES-VWAP 26.20, pullback-from-high 9.75, negative VWAP acceleration, weak RSI/ADX warnings, and no early progress. Broad filters are unsafe because protected extended-VWAP winners remain valuable, so this tests only the charm-pin dynamic VWAP/recent-high-rejection admission box.
